markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress and align on reporting and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relay Reporting:** The initial strategy is a funnel (Publish → Index → Perform) to fix foundational issues. A key win is that 4 of 5 previously unindexed articles self-corrected, signaling improving site health.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**HX Strategy:** Shift from low-volume "vs." articles to high-volume "best of" roundups (e.g., "Best InsureTech Software" @ 1.2k searches/mo) to capture traffic. The goal is to get product team insights to inform these roundups, overcoming their resistance to AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Logic Pivot:** Logic is considering a strategic pivot. The immediate plan is to complete approved content while using the next sync to define the new direction. A Managing Director (Jakub) will join to guide this strategic discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Topics

### Relay Reporting Strategy

  - [**Framework:** A funnel (Publish → Index → Perform) to fix foundational issues before focusing on ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Publishing:** Blocked pending Kelvin's update to the article list (no updates since Nov 3).](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Indexing:**](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Win:** 4 of 5 previously unindexed articles self-corrected, signaling improving site health.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [**Action:** Request indexing for the 1 remaining unindexed article via GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [**Flag for Client:** 100+ pages (including some of ours) are in "Discovered, not indexed" status. The client must manually request indexing for these, 10 per day.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Blog traffic is growing naturally (\~100 visits/week), a healthy signal.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** Report only the "Citations" metric, as it's the most reliable signal of progress.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

### HX Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Client-requested "vs." articles have near-zero search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to high-volume "best of" roundups.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Example:** "Best InsureTech Software" (1.2k searches/mo) vs. "HX vs. Competitor" (0 searches/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use tomorrow's product team meeting to capture insights on competitors and the market.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [**Why:** This provides the "HX perspective" needed to overcome the client's resistance to AI-generated roundups.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Meeting Prep:** Share a high-level list of competitor and roundup topics to guide the discussion, explicitly framing it as a strategic overview, not a line-edit session.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

### Logic Strategic Pivot

  - [**Situation:** Logic sent a doc on Friday outlining a potential strategic pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [**Immediate Plan:** Complete approved content on the current calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [**Next Sync:** Use the sync to define the new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [**Support:** A Managing Director (Jakub) will join to guide the high-level discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Share the high-level competitor/roundup list with HX before tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Request indexing for the 1 remaining unindexed Relay article via GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
      - [Join the Logic sync to provide strategic guidance on the potential pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [**Kelvin:**](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [Update the Relay article list to unblock reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/1pJdQgRqb7bZy4L7UWiXX6Yyv8UKMxzK?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
